meaning: n.轴承,关系,方面,意义,[pl.] 方向,方位
examples: Recent events had no bearing on our decision.
Young people are bearing the brunt of unemployment.
The fights themselves are relatively civil, bearing closer resemblance to martial arts sparring than uninhibited brawls.
From about 5 pm, representatives of each contrada parade in historical costume, each bearing their individual banners.
